originalTitle: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
summary: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
content: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
chineseTitle: 刚果民主共和国因埃博拉疫情取消世界杯训练营
chineseSummary: 此次疫情由一种罕见的埃博拉病毒引起，据信迄今为止已造成 139 人死亡。
chineseContent: 此次疫情由一种罕见的埃博拉病毒引起，据信迄今为止已造成 139 人死亡。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
